\tzpentry{ID3821}{Wedge Dq Sum DOmega Wedge Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3821 introduces Wedge Dq Sum DOmega Wedge Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[Wedge] \mathrm{d}q[[i]], {i, 1, 3}] + Sum[\[Epsilon]^{i j k} L_j\, \mathrm{d}\omega_k \[Wedge] \mathrm{d}\omega_i, {i,1,3},{j,1,3},{k,1,3}]; \omega ]\); \end{implementation} \subsection{Poisson Bracket} \begin{definition}[Poisson Bracket] Given the symplectic form \(\omega\), the Poisson bracket of two observables \(F,G\in C^{\infty}(\mathcal{P})\) is defined by \[ \{F,G\}_{\omega} = \omega^{-1}(\mathrm{d}F,\mathrm{d}G). \]
